stability.rationale: Conservative provisional classification for GAL-0 galactic region registry entries; coarse region ids remain loadable but will be replaced by dynamic galaxy domain packs.
stability.replacement_target: Replace GAL-0 galactic region ids with dynamic galaxy domain pack semantics.
